3110540.name: Blade Trick
3110540.description: Enter into a dark fantasy world with Blade Trick, a unique blend of JRPG and point-and-click Adventure in the style of your favorite '90s classics. Take on the role of The Magician's Shadow, an entity capable of turning the memories of foes into allies as you uncover the secrets of a city in a perpetual state of darkness, faintly lit by a single star. Defeat enemies in turn-based combat and convert their memories into powerful stat boosts using a unique grid system as you venture deeper into the heart of the city to shine more light on your mysterious purpose. Currently in development.
